magpie4 2.74.0
  • Reference

SOM2

Source: R/SOM2.R
SOM2.Rd

Calculates soil organic carbon stock size based on a MAgPIE gdx file (for threepool realization)

Usage

SOM2(gdx, type = "stock", level = "regglo", noncropAggr = TRUE)

Arguments

gdx

GDX file

type

"stock" (default) for absoulte values, "density" for per hectar values

level

Level of regional aggregation; "reg" (regional), "glo" (global), "regglo" (regional and global)

noncropAggr

aggregate non cropland types to 'noncropland' (if FALSE all land types of pools59 will be reported)

Value

A MAgPIE object containing som values

Author

Kristine Karstens

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
  x <- SOM2(gdx)
} # }

On this page

Developed by Benjamin Leon Bodirsky, Florian Humpenoeder, Jan Philipp Dietrich, Miodrag Stevanovic, Isabelle Weindl, Kristine Karstens, Xiaoxi Wang, Abhijeet Mishra, Felicitas Beier, Jannes Breier, Amsalu Woldie Yalew, David Chen, Anne Biewald, Stephen Wirth, Patrick von Jeetze, Debbora Leip, Michael Crawford, Marcos Alves, Pascal Sauer, Patrick Rein.
